description_long: This is a full-size black computer keyboard featuring a standard key layout with a dedicated number pad on the right. The surface is matte and the keys are slightly raised, each with white printed characters for clear visibility. The keyboard has a low-profile rectangular chassis with rounded corners and a slim profile, making it suitable for desktop use. The keys are arranged in a familiar QWERTY configuration, with function keys along the top row and arrow keys in an inverted T-shape. The material appears to be primarily plastic, with a solid and durable construction. No visible branding or cable is present, suggesting a clean and minimalistic design.
description: A full-size black keyboard with a matte finish, white key labels, and a standard QWERTY layout including a number pad. The design is slim, rectangular, and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the number pad and function keys, with all keys clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and the raised nature of the keys.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the keyboard and the tops of the keys, with the number pad on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the keys from the other side.
